event: Acid Tests combine music, light shows, and participatory psychedelic environments.
Paradise Garage opens in NYC; The Warehouse opens in Chicago.
Disco Demolition Night symbolizes mainstream disco backlash.
Phuture's Acid Tracks and Ibiza-to-UK acid house transmission become key catalysts.
Love Parade begins; US rave energy takes shape through Frankie Bones/Storm Rave lineage.
Castlemorton Common free festival becomes UK policy flashpoint.
UK Criminal Justice and Public Order Act targets unauthorized raves/repetitive beats.
RAVE Act passes as Illicit Drug Anti-Proliferation Act.
Love Parade crowd crush ends original parade.
Hard techno revival, global streams, harm-reduction urgency, no-phone underground parties.
